exact.verifyMatches: UniversalSettle destination for the signed transfer

sla-escrow.resolve: GET /api/v1/facilitator/sellers/{seller}/rails/sla-escrow?asset=<mint> → vaultPda (escrow PDA for that mint; omit asset only to use facilitator default USDC on mainnet/devnet)
sla-escrow.fundPaymentSeller: extra.merchantWallet or extra.beneficiary (seller payout wallet; not payTo)
sla-escrow.bankPda: supported.kinds[].extra.bankAddress (institutional bank account; instruction account — not payTo)
sla-escrow.verifyMatches: payTo equals derive_escrow_pda(accepts[].asset mint, bank) — e.g. USDC escrow PDA on mainnet, not native SOL unless asset is SOL

onboardNote: GET /api/v1/facilitator/sellers/{wallet}/preview returns per-scheme previews (legacy vaultPda on sla-escrow is SOL; see vaultPdaPreviews for USDC). GET .../rails/sla-escrow defaults to canonical USDC when asset is omitted; pass asset=<mint> to match each accepts[].asset from live 402.

paymentMintAllowlist.upgradeWarning: POST /api/v1/facilitator/payment-required/enrich logs when accepts[].asset is not allowlisted (non-blocking)
